_comment: Shipped preset for LaMa Erase. Uses Acly's comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin (https://github.com/Acly/comfyui-inpaint-nodes) — `INPAINT_LoadInpaintModel` + `INPAINT_InpaintWithModel`. Single forward pass over (image, mask), no diffusion, no text. Sub-second latency on a 24GB+ GPU. The InvertMask (#3) between LoadImageMask and the InpaintWithModel mask input is the same trick as in Flux Fill Inpaint — ComfyUI's LoadImage outputs `1 - alpha` for the mask, so we flip it back so the painted region ends up at mask=1.
label: LaMa Erase
description: Erase via LaMa (big-lama.pt). Promptless — paint over what you want removed, the model fills from boundary texture statistics. ~0.5-1 s per click on a 24GB+ GPU. Requires the Acly/comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin + big-lama.pt in models/inpaint/.

image.error: Erase needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.
Erase needs a mask — paint over the area you want to remove before running.
